name: Simple timed spawn
summary: Spawn objects on a timer or in response to input.
llm1Hint: The game can add simple timed spawns, such as falling hazards or recurring enemies.

examples: on key Space -> spawn Bullet at 420,500

constraints.spawnPosition: Use numeric coordinates. Keep spawns inside or just outside the 800x600 play area.
constraints.currentLimit: The current runtime slice does not yet include full projectile physics.
